intended_use: The VISIONAIR™ system is a software application intended to be used with third-party endoscopic systems in the measurement of the nasal respiratory airway. The VISIONAIR™ system measures the nasal res
intended_use_full: The VISIONAIR™ system is a software application intended to be used with third-party endoscopic systems in the measurement of the nasal respiratory airway. The VISIONAIR™ system measures the nasal respiratory airway from the endoscopic images taken in the region of the internal nasal valve (INV) and nasal cavum (NC).
target_condition: Nasal airway obstruction or assessment of upper respiratory airway patency
ground_truth: CT scan cross-sectional area measurements of the same anatomical regions; segmentation by experienced clinicians
other_metrics: CT vs Segmentation Accuracy Test and VISIONAIR™ AI Segmentation Accuracy Test (comparison of segmented endoscopic images by the application vs. segmented images by experienced clinicians) were performed, but specific numerical results are not provided in the summary.
